reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 예전부터 디톡스틱 저장해놓았었는데 이번에 1+1 행사하길래 바로 챙겼습니다!!! 저희 강아지 폼폼이는 디톡스 해줄겸 ,영양도 줄겸 건강에 좋아 구매했어요 ♥ 평소에 배변하고 칭찬해주는데 택배 오자마자 배변 칭찬으로 냉장고에 시원하게 보관해둔 디톡스틱을 꺼내 주니까 너무 너무 맛있어하네요 ㅎㅎ대에에에박 성공적이에요!!!!! 티끌까지 끌어모아 쪽쪽 빨아 먹었어요 ~~ㅎㅎㅎ평소에 사과나 과일은 너무 좋아하는데 야채는 안좋아해서 골라내곤 하거든요! 근데 야채 과일을 함께 줄수있으니 너무 좋아요. 어디 나갈때도 스틱 챙겨가면 간편하고 패키지 디자인도 넘 이쁩니다!! 바잇미 디자인 최고..!!! 그리고 이때까지는 바잇미 꿀단호박스틱을 너무 잘먹었어요! 요번에는 디톡스틱으로 저희 강아지 챙겨주려구요 ㅎㅎ저희 강아지는 바잇미꺼는 다 잘먹네요! 맛있고 좋은제품을 아나봐요 ㅎㅎ알러지도 없고 좋습니다!!! 감사해요~~
reviews.content_en: I had been saving the DETOX STICK for a while, and when they had a 1+1 sale, I grabbed it right away!!! I bought it for my dog Pompom to do a detox and provide nutrition for her health ♥ I usually praise her after she goes to the bathroom, and as soon as the package arrived, I took out the chilled DETOX STICK from the fridge to praise her for going potty, and she absolutely loves it ㅎㅎ It's a huge success!!!!! She sucked up every last bit, even the tiniest crumbs ~~ ㅎㅎㅎ She normally loves apples and fruits but doesn't like vegetables and picks them out, but now I can give her vegetables and fruits together so it's perfect. It's convenient to bring a stick when we go out, and the package design is so pretty!! BITE ME's design is the best...!!! And until now she's been eating BITE ME's honey pumpkin stick so well! This time I'm going to take care of my pup with the DETOX STICK ㅎㅎ My dog eats everything from BITE ME well! She must know it's tasty and a good product ㅎㅎ No allergies and it's great!!! Thank you~~

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
먹는걸 좋아하고 잘 움직이지 않는 뚱댕이 체질이라 간식을 줄 때 늘 칼로리를 신경쓰는 타입인 댕댕이를 8년째 모시고 있어요! 다이어트를 하지만 음수량이 부족하지않게 츄르 형태의 간식을 챙겨주고 있는데 보통 츄르는 11칼kcal이상인데 이 제품은 9칼로리 정도 되어서 좋았어요 
성분도 사료에서 주로 섭취하는 성분이 주가 아니라 부족한 영양소를  채워줄 수 있을 것 같아 좋네요
기호성도 좋아서 과일을 좋아하는 댕댕이들은 물과 함께 섞어줘도 잘 먹고 약을 함께 섞어먹여도 단맛때문에 잘 먹어줄 것 같아요
어제 중성화하고 돌아온 둘째도 잘 먹어줘서 기분이 좋네요!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves to eat and has that chubby couch potato personality, so I've always been mindful of calories when giving treats, and I've been taking care of her for 8 years now! While she's on a diet, I make sure her water intake is sufficient by giving her chew-type treats, and usually chews are 11+ kcal, but this product is around 9 calories which was great. The ingredients are also good because they're not the same ones she mainly gets from her regular food, but rather fill in the nutritional gaps she's missing. The palatability is great too, so dogs that like fruit will eat it well even when mixed with water, and it seems they'd eat it well even when mixed with medicine thanks to the sweetness. My second pup who just came home from spaying yesterday also ate it well, so I'm in a good mood!

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content:
애기가 너무 좋아하고, 다이어트중인데 걱정없이 먹을수 있어요! 
알러지때문에 눈물도 자주 나는데 걱정없이 줄 수 있어서 좋고 일단 너무너무너무 잘먹어요 워낙 아무거나 다 잘먹긴 하지만 ㅎㅎ 
건강한 간식이라 제일 맘에들어요 다먹고 또 구매할거같아요
reviews.content_en: My baby absolutely loves it, and since she's on a diet, I can give it to her without worry! She gets teary eyes often because of allergies, but it's great to be able to give this without concern, and she eats it so so so well lol. Since it's a healthy treat, I love it the most! I think I'll buy it again after she finishes it.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
사료를 잘 안먹어서 처음엔 트릿을 부숴서 뿌려줬는데 자꾸 사레들고 기침이 잦아져서 얘네를 섞어줬어요 ! 
기침없이 맛있게 잘 먹어서 너무 좋아요 !
reviews.content_en: My pup wasn't eating her regular food well, so at first I crushed the treat and sprinkled it, but she kept choking and coughing a lot, so I mixed these in instead! She eats it deliciously without coughing, so I'm really happy!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아침에 도착해서 밥이랑 섞어서 먹였더니 너무 잘먹었어요
reviews.content_en: It arrived in the morning, and when I mixed it with her meal and fed it to her, she ate it so well!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
너무 좋아해요 기호성 최고 발톱 손질할때나 빗질 또는 목욕할때 하나씩 꺼내서 달래가며 미용합니다
항상 쟁여놓고 먹여요
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much! The palatability is top-notch. When trimming her nails or brushing or bathing, I take one out at a time to calm her down while grooming. I always keep it stocked and feed it to her.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 너무 좋고 잘먹어요!!
체중조절 + 식이알러지 + 디톡스
요 3가지 다 잡는 제품이에요!!ㅎㅎ

양도 딱 적당히 들어있어 부담스럽지 않고
간식으로도 또 밥 위에 토핑으로도 좋을거 같아요!
reviews.content_en: The palatability is amazing and she eats it so well!! This product covers all 3 things: weight management + dietary allergies + detox !!ㅎㅎ The portion size is just right so it's not overwhelming, and it seems like it would be great as a snack or as a topping on her regular food!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
9.6kcal 저칼로리라 부담없이 사료에 토핑 얹어주고 있어요~! 포장 뜯기 전 주물러 섞어주니 물과 분리되는 현상은 없었고 냄새는 약간 사람먹는 야채즙? 냄새가 나요 ㅎㅎ 기호성은 최고입니다 순식간에 먹어치워요;; 매번 야채 챙겨주지 못해 아쉽던 차에 간편하게 먹일 수 있는 츄르가 나와 좋네용
참고로 사진의 하얀건 두부입니다!! 두부 위에 뿌려진게 디톡스틱입니다
reviews.content_en: At 9.6kcal it's low-calorie so I'm putting it on her food as a topping without worry~! I kneaded it before opening the package to mix it in, and there was no separation between it and water. The smell is a bit like vegetable juice that humans drink? ㅎㅎ The palatability is the best - she devours it in no time;; I was always sad about not being able to give her vegetables regularly, so it's great to have a convenient chew-type treat now! By the way, the white thing in the photo is tofu!! The DETOX STICK is sprinkled on top of the tofu.

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 가루 영양제 먹일 때 믹스해주는 용도로 구입했어요. 잘먹는거보니 맛 좋은가봐요
reviews.content_en: I purchased it to mix in when giving powdered supplements. Since she eats it well, it must taste good.

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
다이어트중인 시루에게 간식으로 챙겨주기 너무 좋아요!!
저칼로리에 건강한 원물만 가득 들어있어서 한포씩 들고다니면서 산책할때도 너무 좋아요!!♥
reviews.content_en: It's perfect as a snack for my Siru who's on a diet!! With low calories and packed with only healthy whole ingredients, I can carry one at a time and take it on walks too!!♥

reviews.name: 별****
reviews.content: 사과갈은향이 나면서 건강식 퓨레네요. 아이도 잘먹고 노폐물배출기능까지 있다니 알러지있지만 안심하고 먹일수있겠어요
reviews.content_en: It has an apple-scented aroma and is a healthy puree. My pup eats it well, and it even has a detoxifying function, so even though she has allergies, I can feed it to her with peace of mind.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
매번 여러가지 스틱형 재품들은 사보는데, 신제품 출시됐다고해서 구매했어요. 사람들도 건강때문에 ABC주스 많이들 챙겨먹는데 강아지를 위한 ABC퓨레스틱이 나와서 좋았어요.
비트가 들어갔댜서 혹시 안먹으면 어쩌나 걱정했는데 엄청 잘 먹어요:-) 사료거부하는 날에는 밥위에 토핑처럼 올려주기도하고 살짝 얼려서 산책후에 보상으로 주기도 합니다! 
바잇미 간식 믿고 먹여요👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
I usually try out various stick-type treats, and I bought this because they said a new product was coming out. People often have ABC juice for their own health, so I was happy to see an ABC puree stick for dogs come out.
I was worried that since beet is included, she might not eat it, but she eats it so well! :-) On days when she refuses her regular food, I use it as a topping on her meals, and I also lightly freeze it to give as a reward after walks!
I trust and feed BITE ME treats 👍🏻

reviews.name: 봄****
reviews.content:
이거이거 완전 혁신템♡
재료들이 아주 간결,깔끔하고
무엇보다 넘넘 잘먹어요!
음수량 엄청 신경쓰는편인데
요거 물에 태워먹이기도해요
그래도 맛있는지 엄청잘먹음♡
그리고 펼쳐보면 들어간 재료들이 눈에 보여요!
심지어 살도 안쪄,,,,최고야 바잇미
reviews.content_en:
This is totally a game-changer! ♡
The ingredients are super simple and clean,
and most importantly, she eats SO well!
I'm really mindful about her water intake,
so I also dissolve this in water to get her to drink more, and she still eats it super well because it's tasty! ♡
And when you open it up, you can actually see all the ingredients inside!
Plus she's not gaining weight at all... BITE ME is the best!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
애기가 너무 좋아해요!!
츄르처럼 먹일수도 있고, 사료가 심심할때 토핑으로도 좋아요 
특히 다이어트중이라 간식을 주고 싶어도 맘편하게 못주는데, 
이름부터 슬림디톡 ㅎㅎ 조금이나마 맘편하게 줄 수 있어서 좋았어요~
reviews.content_en:
My baby loves it so much!!
I can feed it like a churu, and it's also great as a topping when her regular food gets boring.
Especially since she's on a diet, I felt guilty giving treats, but with a name like Slim Detox hehe, I can give it to her with peace of mind! ~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 알러지가 심한 편이라 아무거나 못먹이고 원재료 꼼꼼히 보구 구매하는 편이에요 일단 성분합격이고 기호성도 너무 좋네요^~^ 행사 자주해주시면 좋겠어용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She has severe allergies so I can't feed her just anything—I carefully check the ingredients before buying. First, the ingredients passed the test and her preference for it is great too! ^~^ I hope you have sales often! hehe

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 알러지가 있어서 간식 줄때마다 걱정인데 이건 알러지 프리 제품이라 너무 좋아요! 건강한 재료들만 들어있어서 최고!! 거기다 칼로리도 낮아서 다이어트 하는 댕댕이들 한테도 좋을거 같아요!  기호성도 좋아서 강아지가 계속 달라고 하네요!
reviews.content_en: She has allergies so I'm always worried when giving treats, but this is an allergy-free product so I love it! Only healthy ingredients inside, it's the best!! Plus the calorie count is low, so it should be great for pups on a diet too! She has great appetite for it so my dog keeps asking for more!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리 댕댕이 제일 최애간식 되었어요! 디톡스틱 하나만 들고 있다면 세상 얌전이가 된답니다 :) 목욕 후, 산책 후, 심지어 청소기 돌릴때도 이거하나면 짖질 않아요! 또 사러 올게요!
reviews.content_en: It became my pup's #1 favorite treat! If I just have one detox stick, she becomes the sweetest angel :) After baths, after walks, even when I'm running the vacuum—one of these and she doesn't bark! I'll be back to buy more!

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content:
평소 육류 간식을 많이 먹어서 주문해봤어요.
츄르타입은 잘 안먹어서 좀 걱정이긴 하지만
잘 먹어줬음 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en:
My pup usually eats a lot of meat-based treats, so I ordered this.
I'm a bit worried since she doesn't usually like churu-type treats,
but I hope she'll eat this well.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
초특가로 판매해서 한번 구매해봤어요!
건강한 재료들만 들어있어서 안심하고 맛있게 먹일 수 있을거 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
I bought it once because they were selling it at a special price!
Since it only has healthy ingredients, I think I can feed it to her with confidence and she'll enjoy it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
루이가 요즘 사료를 잘 안먹는데 사료랑 같이 주니깐 밥도 아주 깨끗하게 잘먹어요!!
아무래도 디톡스는 아침에 주는게 가장 좋은거 같아서 저는 아침줄때 사료랑 섞어서 주고있어요.
기호성도 너무 좋고 몸에 좋은건 다들어가있어서 안심하고 먹일수 있어요 그리고 무엇보다 소화가 잘되는 제품인거 같아요!! 
간편하게 들고다닐수 있어서 애카나 애동카 갔을때 들고다니면서 급여하기 좋은거 같아요! 칼로리도 낮아서 딱입니다✨주변 친구들하고도 나눠먹어야 겠어요🤍
reviews.content_en:
Louis hasn't been eating her regular food well lately, but when I give it together with her meals, she eats every bite so cleanly!!
I think it's best to give the detox stick in the morning, so I mix it with her food in the mornings.
She has great appetite for it and it has all the good stuff in it, so I can feed it with confidence. And most importantly, it seems to be a product that's easy to digest!!
Since it's convenient to carry around, it's great to bring it when we go to pet cafes or dog parks and feed it to her. The calorie count is also low, perfect! ✨ I need to share this with my friends too! 🤍

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 츄르 너무 좋아하는 우리 강아지 택배 박스 뜯자마자 눈치 바로 채고 얼른 달라구 난리난리 일단 좀 상콤하고 달달한 냄새 나고 기호성 최고에요 👍🏻 칼로리도 저칼로리라 부담 없이 급여 가능할거 같아요 너무 잘 먹어서 소다펍 살짝 얼려서 급여 해보려구요 짱짱 넘 잘먹음 😊
reviews.content_en: Our pup loves chews so much—as soon as I opened the delivery box, he immediately caught on and started begging for it right away! 👍🏻 It has a nice tangy-sweet smell and he's crazy about it. Plus the calories are low, so I can feel good about giving it to him regularly. He eats it so well that I'm thinking about freezing it a bit and giving it to him that way. He absolutely loves it! 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 일단 각종 첨가물없이 성분이 깔끔해서 너무 좋았어요! 알러지가 있는 아이라서 그런거에 민감하거든요  또 타피오카전분을 먹으면 긁는 애라서 스틱류를 못먹이는데 디톡스틱은 대신 한천이 들어가있어서 넘 좋았어요! 입이 심하게 짧은 아인데 고구마랑 사과 등 들어가있어선지 기호성도 매우 좋았습니다! 칼로리가 낮아서 다이어트필요한 댕댕이들에게 추천합니다!
reviews.content_en: First of all, I loved that the ingredients are clean with no additives whatsoever! My pup has allergies, so I'm really careful about things like that. He also scratches when he eats tapioca starch, so I can't give him stick treats—but the DETOX STICK is amazing because it has agar instead! My pup has a pretty short snout, but he seems to really love it, probably because it has sweet potato and apple in it. The calories are low, so I definitely recommend it for pups that need to diet!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
채소를 싫어하는 강아지에게 안성맞춤입니다!
11개월 시바견 강아지
화식을 먹거나 사료에 채소를 섞어주면
당근 브로콜리만 퉤퉤…
건조기에 돌려서 줘도 안 먹고…
동결건조 채소도 안 먹고…
채소과일이 들어간 츄르를 사주었는데 기호성이 별로였는지 안 먹어서 포기했었거든요
그런데 바잇미에서 이번에 출시한 디톡스틱은 
잘 먹어서 너무너무 좋습니다❣️
고기만 좋아하는 강아지를 위한 
과채100% 디톡스틱 최고🫶
reviews.content_en:
Perfect for dogs that hate vegetables!
11-month-old Shiba Inu
Whenever I give him raw food or mix veggies into his kibble, he just spits out the carrots and broccoli 😤
He won't eat them even when I dehydrate them...
He won't touch freeze-dried veggies either...
I tried giving him a chew with veggies and fruit, but he wouldn't eat it because he didn't like it, so I gave up.
But the DETOX STICK that BITE ME just released?
He eats it so well—I'm so happy! ❣️
For a pup that only loves meat,
the 100% veggie & fruit DETOX STICK is the best! 🫶

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아이들이 대부분 고기 간식 위주잖아요?
그래서 단호박 스틱이랑 슬림 디톡스틱 사 봤는데
요것 또한 너무 잘 먹어요.
양도 꽤 되고 안에 내용물이 좀 있어서 은근 허기 달래기도 좋고요.
아이가 이거 꺼내러 서랍만 가면 바로 따라와서
앉아서 기다립니다❤️
계속 사 줄 생각이에요.
영양소 골고루 챙겨줄 수 있어서 너무 좋습니다.👍👍
reviews.content_en:
Most dogs are mainly into meat treats, right?
So I tried the sweet pumpkin stick and the slim DETOX STICK,
and he eats these just as well.
There's quite a bit of it, and there's decent filling inside, so it's great for satisfying hunger too.
Whenever my pup sees me go near the drawer to pull these out, he follows right behind me,
sits down, and waits ❤️
I plan to keep buying these for him.
It's so great that I can give him balanced nutrition. 👍👍

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
울집 강쥐아가가 넘넘 좋아함
먹고 탈도 없고 응가도 무르지않게 단단하게 잘쌈
내 기준 설사하면 애기 고생할까봐 다 끊어버리는데
요곤 먹고 탈없고 이거 주무르고있으면 바로 달려와서
꼬랑지 흔들고 낑낑 코피리 난리남 ㅋㅋ
특가세일이라 사봤는데 원래 가격은 약간 부담시럽 ㅠ
reviews.content_en:
My pup loves it so much! 🐕
He eats it with no issues, his poop stays firm and healthy—never mushy.
I usually cut out treats if he has any digestive trouble because I worry about him suffering,
but with this, he has no problems. When I give him this to chew on, he comes running right over, tail wagging and whining excitedly 😂
I bought it on special sale, but the regular price is a bit steep for my budget 😢

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 그냥줘도 잘먹고 물에타줘도 잘먹고 너무 잘먹어요~  무엇보다 성분이 너무깔끔하고 과채로만 이루어져 부담없이 줄 수 있어 좋아요~ 칼로리도 9.6칼로리로 너무 만족스러운 제품입니당~♥️ 울애기 바잇미 디톡스틱으로 디톡스 제대로 되길🍎🥕🥦🫐🍠
reviews.content_en: He eats it great on its own, and eats it just as well mixed in water—he just loves it so much! 🥰 Most importantly, the ingredients are so clean, and since it's made only from veggies and fruit, I can give it without worry! The calories are only 9.6 cal per piece, so I'm really satisfied with this product ♥️ Hoping my baby gets properly detoxed with BITE ME's DETOX STICK! 🍎🥕🥦🫐🍠

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 고기간식아니면 잘 먹지도않는앤데 달달한 냄새가 나서그런지 너무좋아하더라고요👍 생식에 채소퓨레대채소 넣어도 너무 좋을것 같아요❣ HACCP인증에 국내제조라 믿고먹입니다!
reviews.content_en: He usually won't eat anything unless it's a meat treat, but he really loves this because of the sweet smell! 👍 I think it would work great mixed into raw food or as a substitute for veggie puree too! ❣️ I trust and feed it to him because it's HACCP certified and made in Korea!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집 강쥐가 요새 사료를 바로바로 안먹어서 이런 제품들 섞어서 주고 있는데 잘먹어요~ 고기 성분 아니라 진짜 디톡스 되는거 같고 건강에 도움이 되는 느낌 ㅎㅎ n번째 재구매인데 늘 잘먹는답니다~ 바잇미는 패키지도 늘 예쁘고 제품도 좋아서 믿고 삽니다! 앞으로 더 다양한 간식 내주세요👍🏻☺️
reviews.content_en: My pup has been picky about his kibble lately, so I've been mixing these kinds of products in, and he eats them great! 🐶 Since there's no meat in it, it feels like he's actually detoxing, and it seems to help his health 😄 This is my nth reorder, and he always eats it well! I love BITE ME because the packaging is always pretty and the product is good quality, so I trust it! Please keep coming out with more variety in treats! 👍🏻😊

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
비건 재료라 마음에 들고 칼로리 걱정 없어서 좋아요.
무엇보다 애기가 넘 좋아합니다💛😆
reviews.content_en:
I love that it's made from vegan ingredients and I don't have to worry about calories.
Best of all, my baby absolutely loves it! 💛😆

reviews.name: h****
reviews.content: 기호성도 좋구 패키지도 간편해서 외출할때 가져가기도 좋아요. 평소 육식위주의 식단이라 슬림 디톡스틱 간식으로 부족한 영양도 채워줄 수 있을것같아요 ♡
reviews.content_en: Great palatability and convenient packaging, so it's easy to take on trips! Since he mainly eats meat-based foods normally, I think the Slim DETOX STICK treats will help fill in the nutritional gaps he's missing ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
츄르 산책할때도 가져나가서 간식으로도 영양제먹일때나 음수량채워줄때도 꼭 필요한 츄르! 
너무 잘먹고 휴대하기 좋은 제품이라 편했규
슬림 디톡스틱은 칼로리도 작고 과일야채로만 만들어진 츄르라 부담없이 급여하기 좋았어요!
생선이나 고기가 들어있지않아 냄새도 안나서 상황에 따라 과일야채츄르 좋네요:)
reviews.content_en: A must-have treat! Whether taking it on walks, giving it as a snack, feeding supplements, or increasing water intake - this churu is essential! 🐶 It's so easy to carry and my pup loves it, which makes things convenient. The Slim Detox Stick has low calories and is made only from fruits and vegetables, so I can give it without worry! Since it doesn't contain fish or meat, there's no smell, which is great depending on the situation. Fruit and vegetable churu is a keeper! :)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 간식을 은근 가리는데 이건 딱 주자마자 몇번 맡더니 바로 먹네요 입맛에 맞나봐요 다 먹으면 재구매 해야겠어요 기호성이 좋아보이고 원물 그대로 보여서 안심됩니다
reviews.content_en: My pup is usually picky about treats, but the moment I gave this, she sniffed it a couple times and gobbled it right up! Seems like it matches her taste perfectly. I'll definitely reorder once we finish this one. The palatability looks great and I can see the real ingredients, which is reassuring.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
외출할때에 필수인 슬림 티톡스틱🧡
저희 두부가 사료만은 잘 안먹어서 이 슬림 디톡스틱 뿌려주면
잘 먹더라구요.
야채를 매번 챙겨나갈수 없어서 츄르형태로 나온 이제품이 제격이라 항상 밖에서 밥먹을땐 챙겨나가죠😊
너무 편하게 야채섭취도 가능하고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: Essential Slim Detox Stick for outings! 🧡 Our Tofu doesn't eat regular kibble well, but when I sprinkle this Slim Detox Stick on it, she eats it right up. Since I can't carry fresh vegetables every time we go out, this churu form is perfect for us. I always bring it along for meals outside! 😊 It's so convenient and makes it easy for her to get her veggies!

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
과일은 좋아하지만 채소는 싫은 저희집 애기한테는
사과향으로 유인하고 은근슬쩍 채소까지 먹일 수 있는,, 유일한 방법이 되었습니다😅

평소 사료랑 간식이 육류 위주였기 때문에 별도로 채소를 추가로 급여하고 싶었지만 기가막히게도 퉤퉤 골라 뱉어냈는데
이렇게라도 채소를 급여할 수 있어서 다행이랍니다👍
reviews.content_en: For our pup who loves fruits but hates vegetables, this has become the only way to get her to eat veggies by luring her in with the apple flavor and sneakily getting her to eat the vegetables too 😅 Since her regular diet and treats were mainly meat-based, I wanted to add vegetables separately, but she would just spit them out. So I'm grateful we can at least feed her vegetables this way! 👍

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
다이어트중인 시루에게 간식으로 챙겨주기 너무 좋아요!!
저칼로리에 건강한 원물만 가득 들어있어서 한포씩 들고다니면서 산책할때도 너무 좋아요!!♥
reviews.content_en: So great to give to Siru as a treat while she's on a diet!! 💗 Low calorie and packed with healthy, wholesome ingredients - I carry a pack with me on walks and it's perfect!! ♥

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 고구마 호박이 들어가있어 아주아주 잘먹어요 수분이 많은타입보단 더 걸쭉한편이라 더 좋아요  타사제품들 비린냄새가 많이나는데 이건 고구마나호박이 들어가서인지  달짝지근한 냄새가나서 먹이고 난 후에도 비린냄새가 나지않아 좋아요
reviews.content_en: With sweet potato and pumpkin in it, she eats it really well! It's thicker than watery types, which I prefer. Other brands have a fishy smell, but this one has a sweet, subtle smell from the sweet potato and pumpkin, so there's no fishy odor after feeding - I love that!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
가루 타입 영양제를 먹이다 보니 츄르 같은 액상 간식이 필요해서 이왕이면 채소 등이 많이 함유된 건강한 간식이었으면 좋겠다는 생각에 구입하게 되었는데, 단호박 냄새가 코를 찌름ㅋㅋ 이거 급여할 때마다 나도 단호박죽 먹고 싶은 생각이ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 나도 홀리는데 댕댕이들은 얼마나 먹고 싶겠어~ 후각적 자극이 장난 아님!ㅋㅋ
디톡스틱은 일반 츄르보다 건더기(?)같은게 많이 들어 있음. 재료 원물인 것 같은데, 급여 전 액체+고체가 잘 섞이게끔 주물주물한 다음 줘야하는게 좀 번거롭다면 번거롭겠지만 그래도 건강한 츄르인 것 같아, 이정도야 그냥 몇번 흔들고 주물러서 충분히 줄 수 있음~
병원에서 처방받은 약 먹일 때는 스틱 1개 다 급여하고, 영양제 먹을 때는 반만 급여한 후 밀봉해 냉장보관!! 우리집 댕님도 좋아해서 앞으로도 계속 급여할 예정😄
reviews.content_en: I was feeding powder-type supplements, so I needed a liquid treat like churu. I wanted it to be a healthy snack with lots of vegetables, so I bought this. The sweet pumpkin smell is so strong lol 😂 Every time I give this, I want to eat sweet pumpkin porridge too lol 😂😂😂😂 Even I'm hooked, so I can only imagine how much the pups want it~ The olfactory stimulation is no joke! 😂 The Detox Stick has more "chunks" (looks like actual ingredients) compared to regular churu. They look like raw ingredients, so you do need to knead and mix the liquid and solids together before giving - it might be a bit of a hassle if you think about it, but since it's such a healthy churu, mixing and kneading it a few times is no big deal~ When giving medicine from the vet, I give a full stick, and when giving supplements, I give half and seal it for refrigeration!! Our pup loves it so we'll keep giving it! 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
야채가 좀 부족한듯한 식사를 하는것 같아서 구매했어요.
다이어트도 해야되기에 슬림 디톡스틱이 딱인거 같더라고요.
고구마도 들어있어서 그런지 달달한 냄새도 나고 잘 먹어요.
오전타임에 밥줄때 토핑으로 뿌려주고 있어요.
reviews.content_en: Seemed like our pup's diet was lacking vegetables, so I bought this. Since she also needs to diet, Slim Detox Stick seemed perfect. Maybe because it has sweet potato, it has a sweet smell and she eats it well. I sprinkle it as a topping when feeding in the morning.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 입맛이 까다로워서 한강 산책 모임에서도 쟤는 대체 누굴 닮아서 입이 고급이냐는 소리를 들으며 주는 간식도 못 얻어먹는데다가 새로운 간식 샀다가 남 좋은 일 시키며 나눠주기 일쑤인데 정말 잘먹네요! 고기간식 외에는 입에 안대는데 이 스틱은 잘 먹습니다!
reviews.content_en: With such picky eating habits, even at Han River walking groups people joke about how high-class her taste is - she can't even get free treats from others, and whenever I buy new treats, I end up sharing them with others because she won't eat them. But she really eats this one well! She doesn't touch meat treats much, but she eats these sticks!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
약먹을때 츄르에 항상 섞어주는데 새로운걸로 먹여보고싶어서 구매했어요 쪼물쪼물 주물러준 후에 짜지 않으면 국물? 이 분리되서 나와서 주물러 준 후에 짜주면 좋은거같아요
평소에 채소 좋아하는 아이들이라 잘먹네요
아쉬운점은 택배 받고 나니까 할인율이 더 높아졌다는 점ㅜㅜ
그외에는 유통기한도 길고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I always mix churu with her medicine, so I wanted to try something new and bought this. After kneading it a bit, if you don't squeeze it, a liquid separates out, so it's better to knead it and then squeeze it. Since our pup usually likes vegetables, she eats it well. The only downside is that the discount rate got even better after I received the package 😭 Other than that, the expiration date is long and it's great!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 사실 장난감 사려고 바잇미 들어왔다가 몽땅 지르게 되버렸어요 할인폭이 엄청 크기도 했고 무엇보다 새제품도 먹여 볼수 있는 기회가 바잇미만의 장점같아요 이거 먹여보니ㅜ기호성 매우 높고 잘먹네요 뿌듯합니다 꼭 사세용
reviews.content_en: I actually came to BITE ME just to buy a toy, but ended up getting everything 😂 The discount was huge, and above all, being able to try new products is really a BITE ME exclusive perk. After feeding this to my pup, the palatability is amazing and they're eating it so well. Really satisfied! Definitely recommend getting it.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 우리 14살 노견 달이의 간식으로 구입했어요~쿠싱증후군경계선이라 식이요법으로 체중관리를 해야하고 아직은 짱짱하지만 늘 긴장하면서 케어중인데요 사료만 먹기에는 너무 아까운 견생인지라 칼로리걱정 뚝! 맛은 업! 영양가도 업! 슬림디톡스스틱으로 중간중간 간식으로주고있어요~너무 잘먹어서 만족입니다~
reviews.content_en: I got this as a treat for my 14-year-old senior dog Dali~ She's on the borderline for Cushing's syndrome, so I have to manage her weight through diet. Even though she's still doing well, I'm always careful with her care. Since it seems like a waste to just feed her kibble, this puts my calorie worries to rest! Great taste and nutrition! I'm giving her the Slim Detox Stick as a snack in between meals~ She loves it so much, I'm very happy~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집 강쥐가 너무너무 좋아합니다:) 그리고 성분이 좋아서 믿고 먹을 수 있는것 같습니다! 아주 맛나게 잘 먹고 있습니다:)
reviews.content_en: Our pup absolutely loves this! 😊 And since the ingredients are good quality, I feel confident feeding it to her! She's eating it very deliciously 😊

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
채소 츄르여서 기호성이 안좋으면 어쩌나 했는데 제일 까다로운 블랑이가 너무 좋아하네요.
기호성도 굿. 성분도 굿.
reviews.content_en: I was worried about the palatability since it's a vegetable chew, but even our pickiest eater Blanc loves it so much. Palatability? ✓ Ingredients? ✓

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 약먹일때 약에 짜줘서 먹이는데 너무 좋아요 비린내가 안나고 과일구성이라 달큰한향나서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I use it with medicine by squeezing it onto the pill to make her take it, and she loves it so much! There's no fishy smell, and the fruit composition gives it a sweet, pleasant scent that she enjoys.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 원래 있던 슬림스틱도 잘 먹었는데 신제품 나와서 너무 좋아요:) 이거있으면 완밥!
reviews.content_en: She was already eating the original Slim Stick well, but now the new product is out and she loves it even more! 😊 With this, meal time is perfect!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 내용물 신선해보이고 좋네요. 기호성도 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The contents look fresh and nice. Palatability is good too.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
나쁜 물질들을 체내밖으로 꺼내는데 도움을 준다니
꾸준히 먹여볼생각입니당. 처음엔 주르륵 흐를수 있다 하여
쪼물쪼물딱 만진 다음에 급여했어요. 엄청잘먹어요
다른 츄르에 비해 냄새도 맛잇는거 같아요
reviews.content_en: Since it helps rid the body of harmful substances, I'm planning to feed it regularly. I heard it could be runny at first, so I pinched it a bit before giving it to her. She eats it so well! Compared to other chews, the smell and taste seem better too.

reviews.name: 몽****
reviews.content: 아주 잘먹어요~~건강간식이라  안심하고먹여요~~
reviews.content_en: She eats it really well~~ Since it's a healthy treat, I can feed it to her with peace of mind~~

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:
야채랑 과일은 밷어내고 안먹는 고기고기하는애라 안먹을수도 있겠다 생각하고 구매했는데 ㅋ
완전 잘 먹네요~
향도 거부감 없는 과일 야채즙 같드라구요~
떨어뜨리지않고 먹여야겠어요~
reviews.content_en: My pup is a meat-loving picky eater who usually spits out vegetables and fruit, so I bought this thinking she might not eat it 😂 But she's eating it so well! The scent reminds me of fruit and vegetable juice without any off-putting smell~ I need to make sure not to drop any when feeding it!
